top_signals.title: Walmart says customers are rationing petrol as Iran war hits wallets
top_signals.summary: US retail giant’s shares plunge after saying it absorbed higher fuel expenses to hold down prices for consumers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Soul Mate’ reaches for pathos but remains hollow
top_signals.summary: With a globe-spanning story and plenty of melodrama, Netflix's queer-themed limited series ultimately falters under the weight of its own ambiguity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: DNC autopsy says Biden White House to blame for Harris loss
top_signals.summary: The party’s lack of unity caused party to haemorrhage voter confidence, according to the report’s author
